source: Premier Sport Awards category 1 + JDS API
title: Baseball / Softball Resin Trophies

products.title: 7" Baseball/Softball Astro Award
products.description: A baseball/softball sits on a 3 1/2" column adorned with a star and draped ribbon. The shield shaped base offers plenty of room for a personalized plate to complete the award. This is the smallest of 3 available sizes to fill the award needs of any budget!

products.title: 8 3/4" Baseball/Softball Astro Award
products.description: A baseball/softball sits on a 5 1/8" column adorned with a star and draped ribbon. The shield shaped base offers plenty of room for a personalized plate to complete the award. This is the mid-size of 3 available sizes to fill the award needs of any budget!

products.title: 10 3/4" Baseball/Softball Astro Award
products.description: A baseball/softball sits on a 7 1/4" column adorned with a star and draped ribbon. The shield shaped base offers plenty of room for a personalized plate to complete the award. This is the largest of 3 available sizes to fill the award needs of any budget!

products.title: 6" Baseball/Softball Aspire Resin
products.description: The sport ball on the Aspire resin sits on top of a riser with silver and gold banners and a star design, and the base offers plenty of room for a sublimated or engraved plate. Budget friendly but still impressive, each resin is individually boxed. Just add your plate and they're ready to go!

products.title: 8" Baseball/Softball Aspire Resin
products.description: The sport ball on the Aspire resin sits on top of a riser with silver and gold banners and a star design, and the base offers plenty of room for a sublimated or engraved plate. Budget friendly but still impressive, each resin is individually boxed. Just add your plate and they're ready to go!

products.title: 6" Baseball Broadcast Resin
products.description: Broadcast Resins are individually boxed and the plates are not included. They are an Antique Gold/Black resin that comes in 2 different sizes and 9 different styles including a 2 inch insert holder. Resins are a great alternative to building a trophy!

products.title: 7" Baseball Broadcast Resin
products.description: Broadcast Resins are individually boxed and the plates are not included. They are an Antique Gold/Black resin that comes in 2 different sizes and 9 different styles including a 2 inch insert holder. Resins are a great alternative to building a trophy!

products.title: 7" Softball Banner Resin
products.description: JDS Banner Resins are individually boxed and the plates are not included. They are a full color, Bright Silver and Gold resin that comes in 2 different sizes and 9 different styles. Resins are a great alternative to building a trophy!

products.title: 8 1/2" Softball Banner Resin
products.description: JDS Banner Resins are individually boxed and the plates are not included. They are a full color, Bright Silver and Gold resin that comes in 2 different sizes and 9 different styles. Resins are a great alternative to building a trophy!

products.title: 7" Baseball / Softball Blaze Award
products.description: Blaze Award -7" Baseball/Softball Award. Back of the award is plain. Material: Plastic. Color: Gold. Weighted plastic awards are individually boxed.

products.title: 6 1/2" Baseball/Softball Cobra Award
products.description: The 6 1/2" Baseball/Softball Cobra Award is made of weighted plastic. The gold/antique gold award has a rounded back with the "hood" detail around the ball. Just add a plate to this award and it's ready to go! All weighted plastic awards are individually boxed.

products.title: 7 1/2" Baseball/Softball Cobra Award
products.description: Cobra Award - 7 1/2" Baseball/Softball Award. Material: Plastic. Color: Antique Gold. The back is rounded with the "hood" detail around it. Weighted plastic awards are individually boxed.

products.title: 9" Baseball/Softball Cobra Award
products.description: Cobra Award - 9" Baseball/Softball Award. Material: Plastic. Color: Antique Gold. The back is rounded with the "hood" detail around it. Weighted plastic awards are individually boxed.

products.title: 10 1/2" Baseball/Softball Cobra Award
products.description: Cobra Award - 10 1/2" Baseball/Softball Award. Material: Plastic. Color: Antique Gold. The back is rounded with the "hood" detail around it. Weighted plastic awards are individually boxed.

products.title: 12" Baseball/Softball Cobra Award
products.description: Cobra Award - 12" Baseball/Softball Award. Material: Plastic. Color: Antique Gold. The back is rounded with the "hood" detail around it. Weighted plastic awards are individually boxed.

products.title: 5 1/2" Baseball/Softball Embrace Resin
products.description: The Baseball/Softball Embrace resin in antique silver and gold features a 2" ball "embraced" by ribbons of silver and gold. The engraving area on the base has room for a nice sized plate for personalization. This resin is also available in a 6 1/2" size. Very little labor involved, just add your plate and it's ready to go. Each resin is individually boxed.

products.title: 6 1/2" Baseball/Softball Embrace Resin
products.description: The Baseball/Softball Embrace resin in antique silver and gold features a 21/2" ball "embraced" by ribbons of silver and gold. The engraving area on the base has room for a nice sized plate for personalization. This resin is also available in a 5 1/2" size. Very little labor involved, just add your te and it's ready to go. Each resin is individually boxed.

products.title: 6" Baseball Happy Cup Trophy
products.description: Happy Cup Trophies are shipped fully assembled and individually boxed. They are a full color sport ball in a Bright Gold Trophy cup. They come in 4 different styles- Baseball, Soccer, Basketball and Softball.

products.title: 6 1/2" Baseball/Softball Hurricane Award
products.description: Hurricane Award - 6 1/2" Baseball/Softball Award. Weighted plastic awards are individually boxed. Color: Gold/Silver.

products.title: 9" Antique Gold Male Baseball Resin
products.description: JDS Resins are individually boxed and the plates are not included. They are an Antique Gold resin that comes in multiple sizes and 12 styles. The only White/Silver resin is the JDS31A. Resins are a great alternative to building a trophy!

products.title: 9 1/4" Antique Gold Female Softball Resin
products.description: JDS Resins are individually boxed and the plates are not included. They are an Antique Gold resin that comes in multiple sizes and 12 styles. The only White/Silver resin is the JDS31A. Resins are a great alternative to building a trophy!

products.title: 5 1/2" Baseball Jazz Star Resin
products.description: Jazz Star Resins are individually boxed and the plates are not included. They are full color, Antique Silver/Gold that are 5 ½ inches with 14 different styles including a 2 inch insert holder. Resins are a great alternative to building a trophy!

products.title: 5" Baseball Little Pal Resin
products.description: JDS Little Pals Resins are individually boxed and the plates are not included. They are a full color resin that are 5 inches. They come in 10 different styles. Resins are a great alternative to building a trophy!

products.title: 6" Baseball/Softball Imperial Resin
products.description: Imperial resin awards are available in 3 sizes for 4 sports, as well as a 6" tall 2" insert holder award. The sport balls sit on a pedestal of gold beams that give them an "imperial" look. There is no assembly involved, simply add a personalized plate to the base and they're ready to go! These awards give you an impressive look at a pricepoint to fit any budget making themideal for large tournaments where a number of players are awarded.

These awards give you an impressive look at a pricepoint to fit any budget making themideal for large tournaments where a number of players are awarded.

products.description: Sun Ray Award - 8" Baseball/Softball Award. Color: Gold/Gray/Silver. Weighted plastic awards are individually boxed.

products.title: 5 1/2" Baseball Triad Resin
products.description: Triad Resin - 5 1/2" Baseball. Color: Antique Gold/Silver. Resin is flat on the back. Individually boxed. Plate not included. Maximum plate size : 2 1/2" x 1 1/16".

products.title: 5 1/2" Baseball/Softball Triumph Resin
products.description: Triumph resin awards are available in 2 sizes for 16 sport and academic events and a 2" insert holder you can customize to what you need. Silver with gold accents and stars, each resin features items that represent the event it's intended for. Resins are a great award for any budget and there is very little labor involved, just add a personalized plate and you're ready togo!

Resins are a great award for any budget and there is very little labor involved, just add a personalized plate and they're ready to go!
